description: CLAUDE.md has no YAML frontmatter (name, description). This is expected for project instruction files but the file was included in the artifact list.
fp_reason: CLAUDE.md is a project instruction file type that does not use NL artifact frontmatter by convention — missing frontmatter here is by design, not an omission.
rule_gap: Scoring rules should recognize CLAUDE.md as a distinct artifact type exempt from frontmatter requirements.
suggested_fix: No action needed; CLAUDE.md file type does not require NL frontmatter.

description: skills/e-tax/SKILL.md exceeds the 25k-token read limit; audit coverage limited to first ~150 lines. Full scoring is estimated. Recommend splitting into orchestration SKILL.md plus per-section sub-skill files.
suggested_fix: Split into a top-level orchestration skill and per-form-section sub-skills to stay within read tool token limits.

description: '妥当か' (reasonable/appropriate) used as a vague qualifier for account balance review criteria. Ambiguous — does not specify what constitutes an abnormal balance.
suggested_fix: Replace with explicit criterion: '残高がマイナスでないか、または前年比±50%超の異常値がないか'.

description: Second instance of '妥当か' (reasonable/appropriate) used as a vague qualifier for expense account review. Does not specify what constitutes an abnormal expense.
suggested_fix: Replace with explicit criterion: '異常に大きい科目（前年比200%超等）または小さい科目（前年計上あり、今年0円）がないか'.

description: '適切に設定されているか' (appropriately set) used for home-office business ratio check. Does not specify how to verify appropriateness.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete check: '事業専用面積÷総床面積で算出された按分比率が帳簿と一致しているか'.

description: '網羅的に' (comprehensively) used when instructing Claude to list all applicable deductions. Vague — does not specify the enumeration order or completeness criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with explicit instruction: '次の優先順で全控除を確認する: 1.社会保険料 2.小規模企業共済 3.生命保険料 4.医療費 5.ふるさと納税 6.住宅ローン'.

description: Skill instructs 'uv tool install git+https://github.com/kazukinagata/shinkoku' — a runtime install from a git URL with no version pin. Git URL installs bypass package registry integrity guarantees and resolve to HEAD at install time.
suggested_fix: Pin to a version tag: 'uv tool install git+https://github.com/kazukinagata/shinkoku@v0.6.5' and update to match current plugin version on each release.

description: Spoofs navigator.platform, navigator.userAgent, navigator.userAgentData, navigator.webdriver and patches server-baked OS-detection JS functions to present Windows identity. Purpose: enable Linux users to access Japan NTA e-Tax filing site that discriminates against non-Windows OSes. All manipulations are in-browser client-side; no network exfiltration.
suggested_fix: Add an explicit comment block stating the NTA website enforces discriminatory OS restrictions and this script is defensive compatibility, not deceptive. Current comments are good but a top-of-file NOTICE section would strengthen auditability.

description: Runtime dependencies use '>=' floor constraints (pydantic>=2.0, pdfplumber>=0.10, pyyaml>=6.0.3) rather than exact version pins. Future incompatible major versions could silently break tax calculations.
suggested_fix: Document that uv.lock (already present) is the authoritative pin for reproducible installs; add a note in CONTRIBUTING.md to update lock file on dependency changes.

description: skills/tax-advisor/SKILL.md references files under 'reference/' (singular) while all other skills use 'references/' (plural). Both directories exist and all paths resolve correctly, so this is a naming inconsistency rather than a broken reference.
suggested_fix: Rename skills/tax-advisor/reference/ to skills/tax-advisor/references/ and update all path references in tax-advisor/SKILL.md to match the plural convention used by all other skills.
